articles.title: Charles Hoskinson Praises Cardano’s Growth Amid Bullish Prospects For ADA
articles.description: Charles Hoskinson, the founder of Cardano (ADA), has praised the growth of the network, even as ADA enthusiasts brace for a potential bullish move for price.

articles.title: $0.001 SHIB Price Could Become Reality As Shiba Inu Insider Reveals Crazy Shibarium Momentum
articles.description: The Shiba Inu team is pushing the limits to complete projects and swiftly bringing Shibarium, the groundbreaking layer-2 blockchain, to fruition at the earliest possible juncture.

articles.title: Avalanche Network Addresses Grew by 100% in 2023: Ava Labs President
articles.description: According to John Wu, the President of Ava Labs, the number of addresses on the Avalanche network grew by nearly 100% in 2023. Wu made the statement during an interview with Tony Edward on the Thinking Crypto podcast. He also noted that the network currently hosts about 20 live subnets and over 80 subnets in […]

articles.title: Elizabeth Warren honors Bitcoin creator Satoshi Nakamoto
articles.description: Senator Elizabeth Warren, known for her skepticism towards Bitcoin, publicly celebrated its 15th anniversary by recognizing its creator, Satoshi Nakamoto.

articles.title: Telefónica Partners with Chainlink to Enhance Web3 Security Through GSMA Open Gateway
articles.description: Spanish Telco company Telefonica has announced a partnership with Chainlink to provide secure connections for web3 smart contracts. In a recent press release, the company highlighted plans focused on GSMA Open Gateway API security with blockchain technology at the forefront. According to the release, the partnership will secure the operations of telecommunications networks to connect […]

articles.title: Hedera and Mondelēz Partner: Food Giant Envisions Leveraging DLT
articles.description: In a recent press release, the Hedera Council, which stewards the Hedera open-source proof-of-stake public network, announced its strategic collaboration with Mondelēz International, an American multinational food company. As per the announcement, Mondelēz International envisions enhancing “digital transformation initiatives, supply chain management, and enriched business processes” with the...

articles.title: Cardano’s Hoskinson Voices USDC Concerns as Demand Grows
articles.description: The Cardano Founder isn't keen on inviting centralization into the network by integrating asset-backed stablecoins.
